final:
// // This module converts a 5-bit binary input representing temperature in Celsius (0 to 31) to a 3-bit output indicating whether the temperature is high (000), medium (001), or low (010). The conditions for categorizing the output are: High (0-10), Medium (11-20), Low (21-31). If the input exceeds the defined range, the output should be set to an invalid state (111).
module temperature_sensor (
    input [4:0] temp_in,
    output reg [2:0] temp_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (temp_in <= 5'd10) begin
            temp_out = 3'b000; // Low
        end else if (temp_in <= 5'd20) begin
            temp_out = 3'b001; // Medium
        end else if (temp_in <= 5'd31) begin
            temp_out = 3'b010; // High
        end else begin
            temp_out = 3'b111; // Invalid
        end
    end
endmodule
